description_long: This is a modern wireless game controller, predominantly white with black and colored accents, designed for ergonomic handheld use. The front face features two analog sticks, a directional pad, four colored action buttons labeled X, Y, B, and A, and a central Xbox logo button. Shoulder buttons and triggers are visible on the top edge, with a battery compartment on the back. The controller's surface is smooth and slightly contoured for comfortable grip, with subtle seams indicating assembly points. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with rubberized thumbstick tops and internal electronic components. This object is typically used for gaming and can be found in urban environments such as homes, gaming cafes, or community centers.
description: A white, ergonomic wireless game controller with black and colored buttons, dual analog sticks, and a central Xbox logo button.
description_view_0: Front view showing all control buttons, analog sticks, D-pad, and the Xbox logo button.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved grip, shoulder buttons, and triggers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the battery compartment and the back contours of the grips.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other grip and the profile of the shoulder buttons and triggers.
